free_text: Total gamma-ray production cross-sections for the
interactions of fast neutrons with copper and
Natural mixture of the isotopes in form of hollow cone.
Thickness 5 mm for Cu, 6 mm for Mo, top diameter 85 mm,
Registration threshold was defined by peak of full
on the basic of the hexafluorobenzene - C6-F6 in thin
aluminum cylinder of diameter 54 mm, height 38 mm.
deltaEgamma - gamma energy interval value given as
Corrections were made on the neutron and gamma-flux
attenuation in the samples, neutron multiple
.  Uncertainty of TOF - 5 nanosec = 4% at energy 9 MeV,
Error due to apparatus resolution function.
M.M. Free text was corrected to be
human-readable. Misprint in dates were corrected.
Refs. of four INDC-CCP- reports were added.
STATUS was corrected according to now-days rules.
Data used for comparison on Fig.1 of
authors' data for several gamma energy ranges.
